$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('createdBy').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/isHost').val() === true))

$slugId..write: auth != null && root.child('rooms/' + (newData.exists() ? newData.val() : data.val()) + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/isHost').val() === true
